+            font-size: clamp(16px, 1.5vw, 18px);
+            color: var(--text);
+            scroll-behavior: smooth;
         }
 
         body {
             margin: 0;
+            min-height: 100vh;
+            background: var(--bg);
         }
 
         main {
-            max-width: 720px;
+            width: min(1180px, 100%);
             margin: 0 auto;
-            padding: 1rem;
+            padding: clamp(1rem, 3vw, 2rem);
+        }
+
+        .site-header {
+            margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
+            padding: clamp(1.5rem, 4vw, 2.25rem);
+            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
+            border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
+            color: #fff;
+            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1b2a41 0%, var(--navy) 100%);
+            box-shadow: var(--shadow);
+            border-bottom: 3px solid var(--accent);
+        }
+
+        .site-header__eyebrow {
+            margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
+            font-size: 0.75rem;
+            font-weight: 600;
+            letter-spacing: 0.16em;
+            text-transform: uppercase;
+            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72);
+        }
+
+        .site-header h1 {
+            margin: 0;
+            font-size: clamp(1.85rem, 5vw, 2.75rem);
+            line-height: 1.1;
+            font-weight: 600;
+            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
+        }
+
+        .site-header__tagline {
+            margin: 0.65rem 0 0;
+            max-width: 36rem;
+            font-size: clamp(0.95rem, 2.2vw, 1.05rem);
+            line-height: 1.55;
+            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.78);
         }
 
-        header {
-            margin-bottom: 2rem;
+        .gallery-actions,
+        .add-artwork__actions {
+            display: flex;
+            flex-wrap: wrap;
+            gap: 0.65rem;
+        }
+
+        .gallery-actions {
+            margin-bottom: 1rem;
         }
 
-        h1 {
-            font-size: 2rem;
+        button {
+            font-family: inherit;
+            font-size: 0.88rem;
+            font-weight: 500;
+            min-height: 2.6rem;
+            padding: 0.5rem 0.95rem;
+            border: 1px solid var(--border);
+            border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
+            background: var(--surface);
+            color: var(--text);
+            cursor: pointer;
+            transition: background 0.18s ease, border-color 0.18s ease, color 0.18s ease;
+        }
+
+        button:hover {
+            border-color: #b8c3d1;
+            background: #f8fafc;
+        }
+
+        button:focus-visible {
+            outline: 3px solid rgba(15, 76, 129, 0.28);
+            outline-offset: 2px;
+        }
+
+        #toggle-add-artwork {
+            background: var(--accent);
+            border-color: var(--accent);
             color: #fff;
+        }
+
+        #toggle-add-artwork:hover {
+            background: #0c3f6b;
+            border-color: #0c3f6b;
+        }
+
+        .add-artwork {
+            margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
+            padding: clamp(1rem, 3vw, 1.25rem);
+            border: 1px solid var(--border);
+            border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
+            background: var(--surface);
+            box-shadow: var(--shadow);
+        }
+
+        .add-artwork[hidden] {
+            display: none;
+        }
+
+        .add-artwork h2 {
+            margin: 0 0 0.75rem;
+            font-size: 1.15rem;
+        }
+
+        .add-artwork__hint {
+            margin: 0 0 1rem;
+            font-size: 0.92rem;
+            line-height: 1.5;
+            color: var(--text-muted);
+        }
+
+        .add-artwork__preview {
+            display: flex;
+            flex-direction: column;
+            gap: 1rem;
+            margin: 1rem 0;
+        }
+
+        .add-artwork__item {
+            display: grid;
+            grid-template-columns: 120px 1fr;
+            gap: 1rem;
+            padding: 0.9rem;
+            border: 1px solid var(--border);
+            border-radius: var(--radius-md);
+            background: var(--surface);
+        }
+
+        .add-artwork__thumb {
+            width: 100%;
+            height: auto;
+            display: block;
+            border-radius: var(--radius-md);
+        }
+
+        .add-artwork__fields label {
+            display: block;
+            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
+            font-size: 0.85rem;
+            color: var(--text-muted);
+        }
+
+        .add-artwork__fields input[type="text"] {
+            width: 100%;
+            font-family: inherit;
+            font-size: 0.95rem;
+            padding: 0.55rem 0.7rem;
+            margin-top: 0.25rem;
+            border: 1px solid var(--border);
+            border-radius: var(--radius-md);
+            background: #fff;
+        }
+
+        .add-artwork__categories {
+            display: flex;
+            flex-wrap: wrap;
+            gap: 0.5rem 1rem;
+            margin-top: 0.5rem;
+        }
+
+        .add-artwork__categories label {
+            display: inline-flex;
+            align-items: center;
+            gap: 0.35rem;
             margin: 0;
-            padding: 0.75em 0.25em;
-            background: #2c2c2c;
-            line-height: 1.1em;
+            color: var(--text);
+        }
+
+        .toolbar {
+            position: sticky;
+            top: 0.75rem;
+            z-index: 20;
+            margin-bottom: 1rem;
+            padding: 0.75rem;
+            border: 1px solid var(--border);
+            border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
+            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.94);
+            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
+            box-shadow: var(--shadow);
+        }
+
+        .filters {
+            display: flex;
+            flex-wrap: wrap;
+            gap: 0.55rem;
+        }
+
+        .filters button {
+            background: #fff;
+            color: var(--text-muted);
+        }
+
+        .filters button[aria-pressed="true"] {
+            background: var(--accent);
+            border-color: var(--accent);
+            color: #fff;
         }
 
-        ul {
+        #gallery {
             padding: 0;
             margin: 0;
-            display: flex;
-            flex-direction: column;
-            gap: 1.5rem;
+            column-gap: var(--gallery-gap);
+            column-count: 3;
         }
 
-        li {
-            list-style-type: none;
+        #gallery li {
+            list-style: none;
+            display: inline-block;
+            width: 100%;
+            margin: 0 0 var(--gallery-gap);
+            break-inside: avoid;
+            animation: fade-up 0.35s ease both;
+        }
+
+        #gallery li.gallery-item--wide {
+            column-span: all;
         }
 
-        li a {
+        #gallery li a {
             display: block;
+            overflow: hidden;
+            border: 1px solid var(--border);
+            border-radius: var(--radius-md);
+            background: var(--surface);
+            box-shadow: var(--shadow);
+            transition: border-color 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease;
+        }
+
+        #gallery li a:hover {
+            border-color: #b8c3d1;
+            box-shadow: var(--shadow-hover);
         }
 
-        img {
+        #gallery img {
             width: 100%;
             height: auto;
             display: block;
-            border: 1px solid black;
-            box-shadow: 1px 3px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
+            border: 0;
         }
-    </style>
 
-    <script>
+        #gallery li.is-hidden {
+            display: none;
+        }
 
-    </script>
+        #gallery li[data-uploaded="true"] a {
+            outline: 2px dashed var(--accent);
+            outline-offset: 2px;
+        }
+
+        .category-menu {
+            position: fixed;
+            z-index: 1000;
+            min-width: 11rem;
+            padding: 0.5rem 0;
+            border: 1px solid var(--border);
+            border-radius: var(--radius-md);
+            background: var(--surface);
+            box-shadow: var(--shadow-hover);
+        }
+
+        .category-menu[hidden] {
+            display: none;
+        }
+
+        .category-menu__title {
+            margin: 0;
+            padding: 0.45rem 0.85rem 0.55rem;
+            font-size: 0.8rem;
+            font-weight: 600;
+            color: var(--text-muted);
+            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
+        }
+
+        .category-menu label {
+            display: flex;
+            align-items: center;
+            gap: 0.5rem;
+            padding: 0.45rem 0.85rem;
+            font-size: 0.9rem;
+            cursor: pointer;
+        }
+
+        .category-menu label:hover {
+            background: var(--accent-soft);
+        }
+
+        .category-menu__actions {
+            border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
+            padding: 0.45rem 0.5rem 0.5rem;
+        }
+
+        .category-menu__delete {
+            width: 100%;
+            min-height: 2.25rem;
+            font-size: 0.85rem;
+            color: #b42318;
+            border-color: #fecdca;
+            background: #fff;
+            box-shadow: none;
+        }
+
+        .category-menu__delete:hover {
+            background: #fef3f2;
+            border-color: #fda29b;
+        }
+
+        @keyframes fade-up {
+            from {
+                opacity: 0;
+                transform: translateY(12px);
+            }
+
+            to {
+                opacity: 1;
+                transform: translateY(0);
+            }
+        }
+
+        @media (max-width: 900px) {
+            #gallery {
+                column-count: 2;
+            }
+        }
+
+        @media (max-width: 640px) {
+            .toolbar {
+                top: 0.5rem;
+                padding: 0.75rem;
+            }
+
+            #gallery {
+                column-count: 1;
+            }
+
+            .filters {
+                flex-wrap: nowrap;
+                overflow-x: auto;
+                padding-bottom: 0.15rem;
+                scrollbar-width: thin;
+            }
+
+            .filters button {
+                flex: 0 0 auto;
+            }
+
+            .add-artwork__item {
+                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+            }
+        }
+
+        @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
+            html {
+                scroll-behavior: auto;
+            }
+
+            *,
+            *::before,
+            *::after {
+                animation-duration: 0.01ms !important;
+                animation-iteration-count: 1 !important;
+                transition-duration: 0.01ms !important;
+            }
+        }
+    </style>
 </head>

We have functionality for adding and image and for deleting an image. I also need functionality for storing images that are uploaded but not shown therefore we need the hide image and access to all images that are not shown in the main gallery.

<span style="font-size:2em; color:green; font-weight:bold;">Assistant</span>

Reviewing how uploads, hiding, and deletion are implemented so we can add a proper hidden-images store and UI.

[REDACTED]

Implementing hide vs permanent delete, storing hidden uploads in IndexedDB, and adding a Hidden artwork panel to view and restore them.

[REDACTED]

Here’s how hide vs delete works now:

### Hide image (right-click menu)
- **Gallery images** — removed from the main gallery and saved in this browser (with alt text and categories) so you can restore them later.
- **Added artwork** — kept in browser storage with a `hidden` flag; the file is not deleted.

### Delete permanently
- Only shown for **added artwork** in the right-click menu.
- Removes the upload from IndexedDB entirely.

### Hidden artwork panel
- A **Hidden artwork (N)** button appears when anything is hidden.
- Opens a panel listing all hidden images (built-in and uploaded).
- Each item has:
  - **Show in gallery** — restores it to the main gallery
  - **Delete permanently** — removes it from hidden storage (uploads are deleted from IndexedDB; built-in images are removed from the browser hide list only)

Previously hidden images (from the old “delete” flow) are still recognized and appear in the hidden panel. Refresh the page to pick up the changes.

[REDACTED]

<span style="font-size:2em; color:blue; font-weight:bold;">User</span>

I need to be able to click on the image in hidden artwork and view it full size and also be able to categorize it and edit any properties.

<span style="font-size:2em; color:green; font-weight:bold;">Assistant</span>

Reviewing the hidden artwork panel and how the main gallery handles full-size viewing and editing.

[REDACTED]

Updating hidden artwork cards to link thumbnails to full-size images and add editable alt text and categories.

[REDACTED]

Saving edits before restoring an item to the gallery.

[REDACTED]

Hidden artwork items now work more like the main gallery and the add-artwork flow:

### Full-size view
- Each thumbnail is wrapped in a link — **click it** to open the full-resolution image (original file path for gallery images, full blob for added artwork).

### Editable properties
Each hidden item now has:
- **Alt text** field
- **Category** checkboxes (same set as the rest of the gallery)

Changes save automatically as you type or toggle categories:
- **Added artwork** → saved in IndexedDB
- **Built-in gallery images** → saved in localStorage (hidden record + category override)

When you click **Show in gallery**, any edits are saved first, then the image is restored with the updated alt text and categories.

Refresh and open **Hidden artwork** to try it.

[REDACTED]

+        function readHiddenArtworkForm(card) {
+            const alt = card.querySelector('input[name="alt"]').value.trim() || "Artwork";
+            const categories = [...card.querySelectorAll(".add-artwork__categories input:checked")]
+                .map((input) => input.value);
+            return {
+                alt,
+                categories: categories.length ? categories : ["other"],
+            };

+
+        async function saveHiddenArtworkEdits(card) {
+            const { hiddenKey, hiddenType, uploadId } = card.dataset;
+            const formData = readHiddenArtworkForm(card);
+            const thumb = card.querySelector(".add-artwork__thumb");
+
+            if (hiddenType === "upload") {
+                const uploads = await readUploads();
+                const upload = uploads.find((entry) => entry.id === uploadId);
+                if (!upload) {
+                    return;
+                }
+                upload.alt = formData.alt;
+                upload.categories = formData.categories;
+                await saveUpload(upload);
+            } else {
+                const records = loadHiddenRecords();
+                const record = records.find((entry) => entry.key === hiddenKey);
+                if (!record) {
+                    return;
+                }
+                record.alt = formData.alt;
+                record.categories = formData.categories;
+                saveHiddenRecords(records);
+                saveOverride(hiddenKey, formData.categories);
+            }
+
+            if (thumb) {
+                thumb.alt = formData.alt;
+            }
+        }

I have attached an image of the Hidden Artwork section. The images are in a box that is much larger that the image. Is there anything we can do to make this look more professional.

<span style="font-size:2em; color:green; font-weight:bold;">Assistant</span>

The thumbnail column is stretching to match the tall form column. I'll fix the layout so images sit at their natural size and align to the top.

[REDACTED]

The oversized boxes came from the grid stretching the thumbnail column to match the height of the form fields on the right.

Here’s what changed:

- **Thumbnail column** only wraps the image (`align-items: start` + `align-self: start`) — no more empty space below wide or square images
- **Thumbnail frame** fits the image with a light background, matching the gallery card style
- **Action buttons** sit side by side (“Show in gallery” and “Delete permanently”) instead of a full-width delete bar
- **Mobile** stacks the layout with a sensible max thumbnail width

Refresh the page and open Hidden artwork — each thumbnail box should now hug the image.

[REDACTED]

I need functionality for adding more categories if needed in the future and I also need the functionality for deleting categories and renaming categories.

<span style="font-size:2em; color:green; font-weight:bold;">Assistant</span>

Reviewing how categories are defined and used across the gallery.

[REDACTED]

Implementing dynamic category management: localStorage-backed list, a manage panel, and migration when categories are renamed or deleted.

[REDACTED]

Category management is in place. Here's how it works:

### Manage categories panel
Click **Manage categories** in the gallery actions bar to open a panel where you can:

- **Add** — enter a name and click **Add category**
- **Rename** — edit the name and click **Save** (the filter id updates automatically, e.g. `Pumpkins` → `pumpkin-carvings`)
- **Delete** — removes the category from filters and untags all images using it (with confirmation). **Other** cannot be deleted.

### What updates automatically
When you add, rename, or delete a category, these stay in sync:
- Filter buttons in the toolbar
- Right-click category menu on images
- Add artwork / hidden artwork checkboxes
- Saved category overrides and hidden artwork records
- Browser-stored uploads (IndexedDB)

### Storage
Custom categories are saved in **localStorage** for this browser (`gallery-categories`). The default set is used on first visit.

### Rename behavior
Renaming changes both the **display name** and the **filter id** (slug). All tagged images are migrated to the new id automatically.

Refresh the page and try **Manage categories** to add or adjust your filters.

[REDACTED]

<span style="font-size:2em; color:blue; font-weight:bold;">User</span>

                 .trim();

+        function escapeAttr(value) {
+            return String(value)
+                .replace(/&/g, "&amp;")
+                .replace(/"/g, "&quot;")
+                .replace(/</g, "&lt;");
+        }
+
+        function slugifyCategory(label) {
+            const slug = label.toLowerCase().trim()
+                .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, "-")
+                .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, "");
+            return slug || "other";
+        }
+
+        function loadCategories() {
+            try {
+                const stored = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(CATEGORIES_STORAGE_KEY) || "null");
+                if (Array.isArray(stored) && stored.length) {
+                    return stored;
+                }
+            } catch {
+                // fall through to defaults
+            }
+            return DEFAULT_CATEGORIES.map((category) => ({ ...category }));
+        }
+
+        function saveCategoriesList() {
+            localStorage.setItem(CATEGORIES_STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(categories));
+        }
+
+        function getCategoryLabel(categoryId) {
+            return categories.find((category) => category.id === categoryId)?.label || categoryId;
+        }
+
+        function remapCategoryList(list, oldId, newId) {
+            if (!Array.isArray(list) || !list.length) {
+                return ["other"];
+            }
+            const remapped = list.map((category) => (category === oldId ? newId : category));
+            const unique = [...new Set(remapped)];
+            return unique.length ? unique : ["other"];
+        }
+
+        function removeCategoryFromList(list, categoryId) {
+            if (!Array.isArray(list) || !list.length) {
+                return ["other"];
+            }
+            const filtered = list.filter((category) => category !== categoryId);
+            return filtered.length ? filtered : ["other"];
+        }
+
+        function mergeDiscoveredCategories() {
+            const known = new Set(categories.map((category) => category.id));
+            const discovered = [];
+
+            const registerCategory = (categoryId) => {
+                if (!known.has(categoryId)) {
+                    discovered.push(categoryId);
+                    known.add(categoryId);
+                }
+            };
+
+            gallery.querySelectorAll("li").forEach((item) => {
+                getCategories(item).forEach(registerCategory);
+            });
+            loadHiddenRecords().forEach((record) => {
+                record.categories?.forEach(registerCategory);
+            });
+
+            discovered.sort().forEach((categoryId) => {
+                categories.push({
+                    id: categoryId,
+                    label: categoryId
+                        .split("-")
+                        .map((part) => part.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + part.slice(1))
+                        .join(" "),
+                });
+            });
+
+            if (discovered.length) {
+                saveCategoriesList();
+            }
+        }
+
+        async function countCategoryUsage(categoryId) {
+            let count = 0;
+            gallery.querySelectorAll("li").forEach((item) => {
+                if (getCategories(item).includes(categoryId)) {
+                    count += 1;
+                }
+            });
+            loadHiddenRecords().forEach((record) => {
+                if (record.categories?.includes(categoryId)) {
+                    count += 1;
+                }
+            });
+            const uploads = await readUploads();
+            uploads.forEach((upload) => {
+                if (upload.categories?.includes(categoryId)) {
+                    count += 1;
+                }
+            });
+            return count;
+        }
+
+        function migrateCategoryId(oldId, newId) {
+            gallery.querySelectorAll("li").forEach((item) => {
+                const itemCategories = getCategories(item);
+                if (itemCategories.includes(oldId)) {
+                    setCategories(item, remapCategoryList(itemCategories, oldId, newId));
+                }
+            });
+
+            const overrides = loadOverrides();
+            Object.keys(overrides).forEach((key) => {
+                if (overrides[key].includes(oldId)) {
+                    overrides[key] = remapCategoryList(overrides[key], oldId, newId);
+                }
+            });
+            localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(overrides));
+
+            const hidden = loadHiddenRecords();
+            hidden.forEach((record) => {
+                record.categories = remapCategoryList(record.categories, oldId, newId);
+            });
+            saveHiddenRecords(hidden);
+        }
+
+        async function migrateCategoryIdInUploads(oldId, newId) {
+            const uploads = await readUploads();
+            const changedUploads = uploads.filter((upload) => upload.categories?.includes(oldId));
+            await Promise.all(changedUploads.map(async (upload) => {
+                upload.categories = remapCategoryList(upload.categories, oldId, newId);
+                await saveUpload(upload);
+            }));
+        }
+
+        async function removeCategoryFromAllItems(categoryId) {
+            gallery.querySelectorAll("li").forEach((item) => {
+                setCategories(item, removeCategoryFromList(getCategories(item), categoryId));
+            });
+
+            const overrides = loadOverrides();
+            Object.keys(overrides).forEach((key) => {
+                overrides[key] = removeCategoryFromList(overrides[key], categoryId);
+            });
+            localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(overrides));
+
+            const hidden = loadHiddenRecords();
+            hidden.forEach((record) => {
+                record.categories = removeCategoryFromList(record.categories, categoryId);
+            });
+            saveHiddenRecords(hidden);
+
+            const uploads = await readUploads();
+            const changedUploads = uploads.filter((upload) => upload.categories?.includes(categoryId));
+            await Promise.all(changedUploads.map(async (upload) => {
+                upload.categories = removeCategoryFromList(upload.categories, categoryId);
+                await saveUpload(upload);
+            }));
+        }
+
+        function renderFilters() {
+            filtersNav.innerHTML = `
+                <button type="button" data-filter="all" aria-pressed="${activeFilter === "all" ? "true" : "false"}">All</button>
+                ${categories.map(({ id, label }) => `
+                    <button type="button" data-filter="${escapeAttr(id)}" aria-pressed="${activeFilter === id ? "true" : "false"}">${escapeAttr(label)}</button>
+                `).join("")}
+            `;
+        }
+
+        function renderCategoryList() {
+            categoryList.innerHTML = categories.map(({ id, label }) => `
+                <li class="category-list__item" data-category-id="${escapeAttr(id)}">
+                    <div class="category-list__fields">
+                        <label>
+                            Name
+                            <input type="text" class="category-list__label" value="${escapeAttr(label)}">
+                        </label>
+                        <p class="category-list__slug">Filter id: <code>${escapeAttr(id)}</code></p>
+                    </div>
+                    <div class="category-list__actions">
+                        <button type="button" data-action="save">Save</button>
+                        <button type="button" data-action="delete" class="category-menu__delete"${id === "other" ? " disabled" : ""}>Delete</button>
+                    </div>
+                </li>
+            `).join("");
+        }
+
+        async function renameCategory(categoryId, newLabel) {
+            const trimmed = newLabel.trim();
+            if (!trimmed) {
+                alert("Category name is required.");
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            const index = categories.findIndex((category) => category.id === categoryId);
+            if (index < 0) {
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            const newId = slugifyCategory(trimmed);
+            if (categories.some((category) => category.id === newId && category.id !== categoryId)) {
+                alert("A category with that name already exists.");
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            if (newId !== categoryId) {
+                migrateCategoryId(categoryId, newId);
+                await migrateCategoryIdInUploads(categoryId, newId);
+                categories[index].id = newId;
+                if (activeFilter === categoryId) {
+                    activeFilter = newId;
+                }
+            }
+
+            categories[index].label = trimmed;
+            saveCategoriesList();
+            renderFilters();
+            renderCategoryList();
+            applyFilter(activeFilter);
+            if (!hiddenArtworkPanel.hidden) {
+                await renderHiddenGallery();
+            }
+            return true;
+        }
+
+        async function addCategory(label) {
+            const trimmed = label.trim();
+            if (!trimmed) {
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            let id = slugifyCategory(trimmed);
+            if (categories.some((category) => category.id === id)) {
+                alert("A category with that name already exists.");
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            categories.push({ id, label: trimmed });
+            saveCategoriesList();
+            renderFilters();
+            renderCategoryList();
+            return true;
+        }
+
+        async function deleteCategory(categoryId) {
+            if (categoryId === "other") {
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            const usage = await countCategoryUsage(categoryId);
+            const label = getCategoryLabel(categoryId);
+            if (usage > 0) {
+                const confirmed = confirm(
+                    `"${label}" is used on ${usage} item(s). Remove it from those items and delete the category?`
+                );
+                if (!confirmed) {
+                    return false;
+                }
+            } else if (!confirm(`Delete the "${label}" category?`)) {
+                return false;
+            }

IThings I made and doodled does not sound very professional. What can you do to make me more professional.

<span style="font-size:2em; color:green; font-weight:bold;">Assistant</span>

Reviewing site copy to refine the tagline and other text for a more professional tone.

[REDACTED]

Updating the header copy and meta description for a more professional portfolio tone.

[REDACTED]

Updated the site copy to read more like a portfolio:

| Element | Before | After |
|--------|--------|-------|
| **Page title** | Art Gallery \| Wayne Barrass-Brown | Wayne Barrass-Brown \| Art Portfolio |
| **Eyebrow** | Art Gallery | Portfolio |
| **Tagline** | Things I made and doodled | Original artwork across illustration, painting, and digital media. |
| **Meta description** | (commented out) | A proper search/social summary for the site |

Refresh the page to see it. If you want a different tone, here are a few alternatives for the tagline:

- **Concise:** `Illustration, painting, and digital artwork.`
- **Curated feel:** `A curated selection of original artwork and illustration.`
- **Broader:** `Drawings, paintings, digital art, and personal creative projects.`

Say which direction you prefer and we can swap it in.

[REDACTED]

<span style="font-size:2em; color:blue; font-weight:bold;">User</span>

@@ -690,6 +834,285 @@
                 .trim();
         }
 
+        function escapeAttr(value) {
+            return String(value)
+                .replace(/&/g, "&amp;")
+                .replace(/"/g, "&quot;")
+                .replace(/</g, "&lt;");
+        }
+
+        function slugifyCategory(label) {
+            const slug = label.toLowerCase().trim()
+                .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, "-")
+                .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, "");
+            return slug || "other";
+        }
+
+        function loadCategories() {
+            try {
+                const stored = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(CATEGORIES_STORAGE_KEY) || "null");
+                if (Array.isArray(stored) && stored.length) {
+                    return stored;
+                }
+            } catch {
+                // fall through to defaults
+            }
+            return DEFAULT_CATEGORIES.map((category) => ({ ...category }));
+        }
+
+        function saveCategoriesList() {
+            localStorage.setItem(CATEGORIES_STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(categories));
+        }
+
+        function getCategoryLabel(categoryId) {
+            return categories.find((category) => category.id === categoryId)?.label || categoryId;
+        }
+
+        function remapCategoryList(list, oldId, newId) {
+            if (!Array.isArray(list) || !list.length) {
+                return ["other"];
+            }
+            const remapped = list.map((category) => (category === oldId ? newId : category));
+            const unique = [...new Set(remapped)];
+            return unique.length ? unique : ["other"];
+        }
+
+        function removeCategoryFromList(list, categoryId) {
+            if (!Array.isArray(list) || !list.length) {
+                return ["other"];
+            }
+            const filtered = list.filter((category) => category !== categoryId);
+            return filtered.length ? filtered : ["other"];
+        }
+
+        function mergeDiscoveredCategories() {
+            const known = new Set(categories.map((category) => category.id));
+            const discovered = [];
+
+            const registerCategory = (categoryId) => {
+                if (!known.has(categoryId)) {
+                    discovered.push(categoryId);
+                    known.add(categoryId);
+                }
+            };
+
+            gallery.querySelectorAll("li").forEach((item) => {
+                getCategories(item).forEach(registerCategory);
+            });
+            loadHiddenRecords().forEach((record) => {
+                record.categories?.forEach(registerCategory);
+            });
+
+            discovered.sort().forEach((categoryId) => {
+                categories.push({
+                    id: categoryId,
+                    label: categoryId
+                        .split("-")
+                        .map((part) => part.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + part.slice(1))
+                        .join(" "),
+                });
+            });
+
+            if (discovered.length) {
+                saveCategoriesList();
+            }
+        }
+
+        async function countCategoryUsage(categoryId) {
+            let count = 0;
+            gallery.querySelectorAll("li").forEach((item) => {
+                if (getCategories(item).includes(categoryId)) {
+                    count += 1;
+                }
+            });
+            loadHiddenRecords().forEach((record) => {
+                if (record.categories?.includes(categoryId)) {
+                    count += 1;
+                }
+            });
+            const uploads = await readUploads();
+            uploads.forEach((upload) => {
+                if (upload.categories?.includes(categoryId)) {
+                    count += 1;
+                }
+            });
+            return count;
+        }
+
+        function migrateCategoryId(oldId, newId) {
+            gallery.querySelectorAll("li").forEach((item) => {
+                const itemCategories = getCategories(item);
+                if (itemCategories.includes(oldId)) {
+                    setCategories(item, remapCategoryList(itemCategories, oldId, newId));
+                }
+            });
+
+            const overrides = loadOverrides();
+            Object.keys(overrides).forEach((key) => {
+                if (overrides[key].includes(oldId)) {
+                    overrides[key] = remapCategoryList(overrides[key], oldId, newId);
+                }
+            });
+            localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(overrides));
+
+            const hidden = loadHiddenRecords();
+            hidden.forEach((record) => {
+                record.categories = remapCategoryList(record.categories, oldId, newId);
+            });
+            saveHiddenRecords(hidden);
+        }
+
+        async function migrateCategoryIdInUploads(oldId, newId) {
+            const uploads = await readUploads();
+            const changedUploads = uploads.filter((upload) => upload.categories?.includes(oldId));
+            await Promise.all(changedUploads.map(async (upload) => {
+                upload.categories = remapCategoryList(upload.categories, oldId, newId);
+                await saveUpload(upload);
+            }));
+        }
+
+        async function removeCategoryFromAllItems(categoryId) {
+            gallery.querySelectorAll("li").forEach((item) => {
+                setCategories(item, removeCategoryFromList(getCategories(item), categoryId));
+            });
+
+            const overrides = loadOverrides();
+            Object.keys(overrides).forEach((key) => {
+                overrides[key] = removeCategoryFromList(overrides[key], categoryId);
+            });
+            localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(overrides));
+
+            const hidden = loadHiddenRecords();
+            hidden.forEach((record) => {
+                record.categories = removeCategoryFromList(record.categories, categoryId);
+            });
+            saveHiddenRecords(hidden);
+
+            const uploads = await readUploads();
+            const changedUploads = uploads.filter((upload) => upload.categories?.includes(categoryId));
+            await Promise.all(changedUploads.map(async (upload) => {
+                upload.categories = removeCategoryFromList(upload.categories, categoryId);
+                await saveUpload(upload);
+            }));
+        }
+
+        function renderFilters() {
+            filtersNav.innerHTML = `
+                <button type="button" data-filter="all" aria-pressed="${activeFilter === "all" ? "true" : "false"}">All</button>
+                ${categories.map(({ id, label }) => `
+                    <button type="button" data-filter="${escapeAttr(id)}" aria-pressed="${activeFilter === id ? "true" : "false"}">${escapeAttr(label)}</button>
+                `).join("")}
+            `;
+        }
+
+        function renderCategoryList() {
+            categoryList.innerHTML = categories.map(({ id, label }) => `
+                <li class="category-list__item" data-category-id="${escapeAttr(id)}">
+                    <div class="category-list__fields">
+                        <label>
+                            Name
+                            <input type="text" class="category-list__label" value="${escapeAttr(label)}">
+                        </label>
+                        <p class="category-list__slug">Filter id: <code>${escapeAttr(id)}</code></p>
+                    </div>
+                    <div class="category-list__actions">
+                        <button type="button" data-action="save">Save</button>
+                        <button type="button" data-action="delete" class="category-menu__delete"${id === "other" ? " disabled" : ""}>Delete</button>
+                    </div>
+                </li>
+            `).join("");
+        }
+
+        async function renameCategory(categoryId, newLabel) {
+            const trimmed = newLabel.trim();
+            if (!trimmed) {
+                alert("Category name is required.");
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            const index = categories.findIndex((category) => category.id === categoryId);
+            if (index < 0) {
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            const newId = slugifyCategory(trimmed);
+            if (categories.some((category) => category.id === newId && category.id !== categoryId)) {
+                alert("A category with that name already exists.");
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            if (newId !== categoryId) {
+                migrateCategoryId(categoryId, newId);
+                await migrateCategoryIdInUploads(categoryId, newId);
+                categories[index].id = newId;
+                if (activeFilter === categoryId) {
+                    activeFilter = newId;
+                }
+            }
+
+            categories[index].label = trimmed;
+            saveCategoriesList();
+            renderFilters();
+            renderCategoryList();
+            applyFilter(activeFilter);
+            if (!hiddenArtworkPanel.hidden) {
+                await renderHiddenGallery();
+            }
+            return true;
+        }
+
+        async function addCategory(label) {
+            const trimmed = label.trim();
+            if (!trimmed) {
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            let id = slugifyCategory(trimmed);
+            if (categories.some((category) => category.id === id)) {
+                alert("A category with that name already exists.");
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            categories.push({ id, label: trimmed });
+            saveCategoriesList();
+            renderFilters();
+            renderCategoryList();
+            return true;
+        }
+
+        async function deleteCategory(categoryId) {
+            if (categoryId === "other") {
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            const usage = await countCategoryUsage(categoryId);
+            const label = getCategoryLabel(categoryId);
+            if (usage > 0) {
+                const confirmed = confirm(
+                    `"${label}" is used on ${usage} item(s). Remove it from those items and delete the category?`
+                );
+                if (!confirmed) {
+                    return false;
+                }
+            } else if (!confirm(`Delete the "${label}" category?`)) {
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            await removeCategoryFromAllItems(categoryId);
+            categories = categories.filter((category) => category.id !== categoryId);
+            saveCategoriesList();
+            if (activeFilter === categoryId) {
+                activeFilter = "all";
+            }
+            renderFilters();
+            renderCategoryList();
+            applyFilter(activeFilter);
+            if (!hiddenArtworkPanel.hidden) {
+                await renderHiddenGallery();
+            }
+            return true;
+        }
+
         function loadOverrides() {
             try {
                 return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY) || "{}");
@@ -833,7 +1256,7 @@

I'm not sure about the colour pallet. I want to portray that I'm creative and vibrant.

<span style="font-size:2em; color:green; font-weight:bold;">Assistant</span>

Reviewing the current color tokens and key UI surfaces to shift the palette toward something more creative and vibrant.

[REDACTED]

Updating the palette to a vibrant creative theme—rich purples, magentas, and warm accents—while keeping the layout polished.

[REDACTED]

Updated the palette to feel more **creative and vibrant** while keeping the layout clean:

### New colour direction
- **Background** — warm cream and soft lavender with subtle orange and purple glows
- **Header** — bold purple → magenta → coral gradient
- **Accents** — violet (`#7c3aed`), pink (`#db2777`), and orange (`#f97316`)
- **Filter pills** — soft lavender when idle; gradient when active
- **Add artwork button** — same vibrant gradient with a light glow
- **Gallery cards** — gentle lift on hover with purple-tinted shadows

### What stayed restrained
- Typography and spacing unchanged
- Delete actions still use clear red (universal warning colour)
- Text remains deep plum rather than pure black for readability

Refresh the page to see it. If you want to push it further or dial it back, we can easily tweak — for example more orange, more purple, or a darker header.

[REDACTED]

<span style="font-size:2em; color:blue; font-weight:bold;">User</span>

+
+        .category-list__item {

+
+        .category-list__fields label {
+            display: block;
+            margin: 0;

+

+

+            flex-wrap: wrap;
+            gap: 0.5rem;

+

+

+            gap: 0.65rem;
+            align-items: end;
+            margin-bottom: 1rem;

+
+        .category-add-form label {

+            margin: 0;

+

+        }

+        const addCategoryForm = document.getElementById("add-category-form");

@@ -690,6 +849,285 @@
                 .trim();
         }
 
+        function escapeAttr(value) {
+            return String(value)
+                .replace(/&/g, "&amp;")
+                .replace(/"/g, "&quot;")
+                .replace(/</g, "&lt;");
+        }
+
+        function slugifyCategory(label) {
+            const slug = label.toLowerCase().trim()
+                .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, "-")
+                .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, "");
+            return slug || "other";
+        }
+
+        function loadCategories() {
+            try {
+                const stored = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(CATEGORIES_STORAGE_KEY) || "null");
+                if (Array.isArray(stored) && stored.length) {
+                    return stored;
+                }
+            } catch {
+                // fall through to defaults
+            }
+            return DEFAULT_CATEGORIES.map((category) => ({ ...category }));
+        }
+
+        function saveCategoriesList() {
+            localStorage.setItem(CATEGORIES_STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(categories));
+        }
+
+        function getCategoryLabel(categoryId) {
+            return categories.find((category) => category.id === categoryId)?.label || categoryId;
+        }
+
+        function remapCategoryList(list, oldId, newId) {
+            if (!Array.isArray(list) || !list.length) {
+                return ["other"];
+            }
+            const remapped = list.map((category) => (category === oldId ? newId : category));
+            const unique = [...new Set(remapped)];
+            return unique.length ? unique : ["other"];
+        }
+
+        function removeCategoryFromList(list, categoryId) {
+            if (!Array.isArray(list) || !list.length) {
+                return ["other"];
+            }
+            const filtered = list.filter((category) => category !== categoryId);
+            return filtered.length ? filtered : ["other"];
+        }
+
+        function mergeDiscoveredCategories() {
+            const known = new Set(categories.map((category) => category.id));
+            const discovered = [];
+
+            const registerCategory = (categoryId) => {
+                if (!known.has(categoryId)) {
+                    discovered.push(categoryId);
+                    known.add(categoryId);
+                }
+            };
+
+            gallery.querySelectorAll("li").forEach((item) => {
+                getCategories(item).forEach(registerCategory);
+            });
+            loadHiddenRecords().forEach((record) => {
+                record.categories?.forEach(registerCategory);
+            });
+
+            discovered.sort().forEach((categoryId) => {
+                categories.push({
+                    id: categoryId,
+                    label: categoryId
+                        .split("-")
+                        .map((part) => part.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + part.slice(1))
+                        .join(" "),
+                });
+            });
+
+            if (discovered.length) {
+                saveCategoriesList();
+            }
+        }
+
+        async function countCategoryUsage(categoryId) {
+            let count = 0;
+            gallery.querySelectorAll("li").forEach((item) => {
+                if (getCategories(item).includes(categoryId)) {
+                    count += 1;
+                }
+            });
+            loadHiddenRecords().forEach((record) => {
+                if (record.categories?.includes(categoryId)) {
+                    count += 1;
+                }
+            });
+            const uploads = await readUploads();
+            uploads.forEach((upload) => {
+                if (upload.categories?.includes(categoryId)) {
+                    count += 1;
+                }
+            });
+            return count;
+        }
+
+        function migrateCategoryId(oldId, newId) {
+            gallery.querySelectorAll("li").forEach((item) => {
+                const itemCategories = getCategories(item);
+                if (itemCategories.includes(oldId)) {
+                    setCategories(item, remapCategoryList(itemCategories, oldId, newId));
+                }
+            });
+
+            const overrides = loadOverrides();
+            Object.keys(overrides).forEach((key) => {
+                if (overrides[key].includes(oldId)) {
+                    overrides[key] = remapCategoryList(overrides[key], oldId, newId);
+                }
+            });
+            localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(overrides));
+
+            const hidden = loadHiddenRecords();
+            hidden.forEach((record) => {
+                record.categories = remapCategoryList(record.categories, oldId, newId);
+            });
+            saveHiddenRecords(hidden);
+        }
+
+        async function migrateCategoryIdInUploads(oldId, newId) {
+            const uploads = await readUploads();
+            const changedUploads = uploads.filter((upload) => upload.categories?.includes(oldId));
+            await Promise.all(changedUploads.map(async (upload) => {
+                upload.categories = remapCategoryList(upload.categories, oldId, newId);
+                await saveUpload(upload);
+            }));
+        }
+
+        async function removeCategoryFromAllItems(categoryId) {
+            gallery.querySelectorAll("li").forEach((item) => {
+                setCategories(item, removeCategoryFromList(getCategories(item), categoryId));
+            });
+
+            const overrides = loadOverrides();
+            Object.keys(overrides).forEach((key) => {
+                overrides[key] = removeCategoryFromList(overrides[key], categoryId);
+            });
+            localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(overrides));
+
+            const hidden = loadHiddenRecords();
+            hidden.forEach((record) => {
+                record.categories = removeCategoryFromList(record.categories, categoryId);
+            });
+            saveHiddenRecords(hidden);
+
+            const uploads = await readUploads();
+            const changedUploads = uploads.filter((upload) => upload.categories?.includes(categoryId));
+            await Promise.all(changedUploads.map(async (upload) => {
+                upload.categories = removeCategoryFromList(upload.categories, categoryId);
+                await saveUpload(upload);
+            }));
+        }
+
+        function renderFilters() {
+            filtersNav.innerHTML = `
+                <button type="button" data-filter="all" aria-pressed="${activeFilter === "all" ? "true" : "false"}">All</button>
+                ${categories.map(({ id, label }) => `
+                    <button type="button" data-filter="${escapeAttr(id)}" aria-pressed="${activeFilter === id ? "true" : "false"}">${escapeAttr(label)}</button>
+                `).join("")}
+            `;
+        }
+
+        function renderCategoryList() {
+            categoryList.innerHTML = categories.map(({ id, label }) => `
+                <li class="category-list__item" data-category-id="${escapeAttr(id)}">
+                    <div class="category-list__fields">
+                        <label>
+                            Name
+                            <input type="text" class="category-list__label" value="${escapeAttr(label)}">
+                        </label>
+                        <p class="category-list__slug">Filter id: <code>${escapeAttr(id)}</code></p>
+                    </div>
+                    <div class="category-list__actions">
+                        <button type="button" data-action="save">Save</button>
+                        <button type="button" data-action="delete" class="category-menu__delete"${id === "other" ? " disabled" : ""}>Delete</button>
+                    </div>
+                </li>
+            `).join("");
+        }
+
+        async function renameCategory(categoryId, newLabel) {
+            const trimmed = newLabel.trim();
+            if (!trimmed) {
+                alert("Category name is required.");
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            const index = categories.findIndex((category) => category.id === categoryId);
+            if (index < 0) {
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            const newId = slugifyCategory(trimmed);
+            if (categories.some((category) => category.id === newId && category.id !== categoryId)) {
+                alert("A category with that name already exists.");
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            if (newId !== categoryId) {
+                migrateCategoryId(categoryId, newId);
+                await migrateCategoryIdInUploads(categoryId, newId);
+                categories[index].id = newId;
+                if (activeFilter === categoryId) {
+                    activeFilter = newId;
+                }
+            }
+
+            categories[index].label = trimmed;
+            saveCategoriesList();
+            renderFilters();
+            renderCategoryList();
+            applyFilter(activeFilter);
+            if (!hiddenArtworkPanel.hidden) {
+                await renderHiddenGallery();
+            }
+            return true;
+        }
+
+        async function addCategory(label) {
+            const trimmed = label.trim();
+            if (!trimmed) {
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            let id = slugifyCategory(trimmed);
+            if (categories.some((category) => category.id === id)) {
+                alert("A category with that name already exists.");
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            categories.push({ id, label: trimmed });
+            saveCategoriesList();
+            renderFilters();
+            renderCategoryList();
+            return true;
+        }
+
+        async function deleteCategory(categoryId) {
+            if (categoryId === "other") {
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            const usage = await countCategoryUsage(categoryId);
+            const label = getCategoryLabel(categoryId);
+            if (usage > 0) {
+                const confirmed = confirm(
+                    `"${label}" is used on ${usage} item(s). Remove it from those items and delete the category?`
+                );
+                if (!confirmed) {
+                    return false;
+                }
+            } else if (!confirm(`Delete the "${label}" category?`)) {
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            await removeCategoryFromAllItems(categoryId);
+            categories = categories.filter((category) => category.id !== categoryId);
+            saveCategoriesList();
+            if (activeFilter === categoryId) {
+                activeFilter = "all";
+            }
+            renderFilters();
+            renderCategoryList();
+            applyFilter(activeFilter);
+            if (!hiddenArtworkPanel.hidden) {
+                await renderHiddenGallery();
+            }
+            return true;
+        }
+
         function loadOverrides() {
             try {
                 return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY) || "{}");

+        addCategoryForm.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {

+                await deleteCategory(categoryId);

+        let categories = [];

@@ -690,6 +849,285 @@
                 .trim();
         }
 
+        function escapeAttr(value) {
+            return String(value)
+                .replace(/&/g, "&amp;")
+                .replace(/"/g, "&quot;")
+                .replace(/</g, "&lt;");
+        }
+
+        function slugifyCategory(label) {
+            const slug = label.toLowerCase().trim()
+                .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, "-")
+                .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, "");
+            return slug || "other";
+        }
+
+        function loadCategories() {
+            try {
+                const stored = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(CATEGORIES_STORAGE_KEY) || "null");
+                if (Array.isArray(stored) && stored.length) {
+                    return stored;
+                }
+            } catch {
+                // fall through to defaults
+            }
+            return DEFAULT_CATEGORIES.map((category) => ({ ...category }));
+        }
+
+        function saveCategoriesList() {
+            localStorage.setItem(CATEGORIES_STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(categories));
+        }
+
+        function getCategoryLabel(categoryId) {
+            return categories.find((category) => category.id === categoryId)?.label || categoryId;
+        }
+
+        function remapCategoryList(list, oldId, newId) {
+            if (!Array.isArray(list) || !list.length) {
+                return ["other"];
+            }
+            const remapped = list.map((category) => (category === oldId ? newId : category));
+            const unique = [...new Set(remapped)];
+            return unique.length ? unique : ["other"];
+        }
+
+        function removeCategoryFromList(list, categoryId) {
+            if (!Array.isArray(list) || !list.length) {
+                return ["other"];
+            }
+            const filtered = list.filter((category) => category !== categoryId);
+            return filtered.length ? filtered : ["other"];
+        }
+
+        function mergeDiscoveredCategories() {
+            const known = new Set(categories.map((category) => category.id));
+            const discovered = [];
+
+            const registerCategory = (categoryId) => {
+                if (!known.has(categoryId)) {
+                    discovered.push(categoryId);
+                    known.add(categoryId);
+                }
+            };
+
+            gallery.querySelectorAll("li").forEach((item) => {
+                getCategories(item).forEach(registerCategory);
+            });
+            loadHiddenRecords().forEach((record) => {
+                record.categories?.forEach(registerCategory);
+            });
+
+            discovered.sort().forEach((categoryId) => {
+                categories.push({
+                    id: categoryId,
+                    label: categoryId
+                        .split("-")
+                        .map((part) => part.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + part.slice(1))
+                        .join(" "),
+                });
+            });
+
+            if (discovered.length) {
+                saveCategoriesList();
+            }
+        }
+
+        async function countCategoryUsage(categoryId) {
+            let count = 0;
+            gallery.querySelectorAll("li").forEach((item) => {
+                if (getCategories(item).includes(categoryId)) {
+                    count += 1;
+                }
+            });
+            loadHiddenRecords().forEach((record) => {
+                if (record.categories?.includes(categoryId)) {
+                    count += 1;
+                }
+            });
+            const uploads = await readUploads();
+            uploads.forEach((upload) => {
+                if (upload.categories?.includes(categoryId)) {
+                    count += 1;
+                }
+            });
+            return count;
+        }
+
+        function migrateCategoryId(oldId, newId) {
+            gallery.querySelectorAll("li").forEach((item) => {
+                const itemCategories = getCategories(item);
+                if (itemCategories.includes(oldId)) {
+                    setCategories(item, remapCategoryList(itemCategories, oldId, newId));
+                }
+            });
+
+            const overrides = loadOverrides();
+            Object.keys(overrides).forEach((key) => {
+                if (overrides[key].includes(oldId)) {
+                    overrides[key] = remapCategoryList(overrides[key], oldId, newId);
+                }
+            });
+            localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(overrides));
+
+            const hidden = loadHiddenRecords();
+            hidden.forEach((record) => {
+                record.categories = remapCategoryList(record.categories, oldId, newId);
+            });
+            saveHiddenRecords(hidden);
+        }
+
+        async function migrateCategoryIdInUploads(oldId, newId) {
+            const uploads = await readUploads();
+            const changedUploads = uploads.filter((upload) => upload.categories?.includes(oldId));
+            await Promise.all(changedUploads.map(async (upload) => {
+                upload.categories = remapCategoryList(upload.categories, oldId, newId);
+                await saveUpload(upload);
+            }));
+        }
+
+        async function removeCategoryFromAllItems(categoryId) {
+            gallery.querySelectorAll("li").forEach((item) => {
+                setCategories(item, removeCategoryFromList(getCategories(item), categoryId));
+            });
+
+            const overrides = loadOverrides();
+            Object.keys(overrides).forEach((key) => {
+                overrides[key] = removeCategoryFromList(overrides[key], categoryId);
+            });
+            localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(overrides));
+
+            const hidden = loadHiddenRecords();
+            hidden.forEach((record) => {
+                record.categories = removeCategoryFromList(record.categories, categoryId);
+            });
+            saveHiddenRecords(hidden);
+
+            const uploads = await readUploads();
+            const changedUploads = uploads.filter((upload) => upload.categories?.includes(categoryId));
+            await Promise.all(changedUploads.map(async (upload) => {
+                upload.categories = removeCategoryFromList(upload.categories, categoryId);
+                await saveUpload(upload);
+            }));
+        }
+
+        function renderFilters() {
+            filtersNav.innerHTML = `
+                <button type="button" data-filter="all" aria-pressed="${activeFilter === "all" ? "true" : "false"}">All</button>
+                ${categories.map(({ id, label }) => `
+                    <button type="button" data-filter="${escapeAttr(id)}" aria-pressed="${activeFilter === id ? "true" : "false"}">${escapeAttr(label)}</button>
+                `).join("")}
+            `;
+        }
+
+        function renderCategoryList() {
+            categoryList.innerHTML = categories.map(({ id, label }) => `
+                <li class="category-list__item" data-category-id="${escapeAttr(id)}">
+                    <div class="category-list__fields">
+                        <label>
+                            Name
+                            <input type="text" class="category-list__label" value="${escapeAttr(label)}">
+                        </label>
+                        <p class="category-list__slug">Filter id: <code>${escapeAttr(id)}</code></p>
+                    </div>
+                    <div class="category-list__actions">
+                        <button type="button" data-action="save">Save</button>
+                        <button type="button" data-action="delete" class="category-menu__delete"${id === "other" ? " disabled" : ""}>Delete</button>
+                    </div>
+                </li>
+            `).join("");
+        }
+
+        async function renameCategory(categoryId, newLabel) {
+            const trimmed = newLabel.trim();
+            if (!trimmed) {
+                alert("Category name is required.");
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            const index = categories.findIndex((category) => category.id === categoryId);
+            if (index < 0) {
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            const newId = slugifyCategory(trimmed);
+            if (categories.some((category) => category.id === newId && category.id !== categoryId)) {
+                alert("A category with that name already exists.");
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            if (newId !== categoryId) {
+                migrateCategoryId(categoryId, newId);
+                await migrateCategoryIdInUploads(categoryId, newId);
+                categories[index].id = newId;
+                if (activeFilter === categoryId) {
+                    activeFilter = newId;
+                }
+            }
+
+            categories[index].label = trimmed;
+            saveCategoriesList();
+            renderFilters();
+            renderCategoryList();
+            applyFilter(activeFilter);
+            if (!hiddenArtworkPanel.hidden) {
+                await renderHiddenGallery();
+            }
+            return true;
+        }
+
+        async function addCategory(label) {
+            const trimmed = label.trim();
+            if (!trimmed) {
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            let id = slugifyCategory(trimmed);
+            if (categories.some((category) => category.id === id)) {
+                alert("A category with that name already exists.");
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            categories.push({ id, label: trimmed });
+            saveCategoriesList();
+            renderFilters();
+            renderCategoryList();
+            return true;
+        }
+
+        async function deleteCategory(categoryId) {
+            if (categoryId === "other") {
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            const usage = await countCategoryUsage(categoryId);
+            const label = getCategoryLabel(categoryId);
+            if (usage > 0) {
+                const confirmed = confirm(
+                    `"${label}" is used on ${usage} item(s). Remove it from those items and delete the category?`
+                );
+                if (!confirmed) {
+                    return false;
+                }
+            } else if (!confirm(`Delete the "${label}" category?`)) {
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            await removeCategoryFromAllItems(categoryId);
+            categories = categories.filter((category) => category.id !== categoryId);
+            saveCategoriesList();
+            if (activeFilter === categoryId) {
+                activeFilter = "all";
+            }
+            renderFilters();
+            renderCategoryList();
+            applyFilter(activeFilter);
+            if (!hiddenArtworkPanel.hidden) {
+                await renderHiddenGallery();
+            }
+            return true;
+        }
+
         function loadOverrides() {
             try {
                 return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY) || "{}");
@@ -833,7 +1271,7 @@

I like the colours can you make it slightly more subtle

<span style="font-size:2em; color:green; font-weight:bold;">Assistant</span>

Checking for any remaining bright accent colors to soften.

[REDACTED]

I've toned the palette down while keeping the same purple–rose–warm direction. Changes:

- **Background** — softer cream and lavender base, with radial glows at roughly half the previous opacity
- **Accents** — desaturated violet, dusty rose, and muted terracotta instead of bright purple, magenta, and orange
- **Gradients** — same flow but gentler stops, with less contrast between steps
- **Shadows & hovers** — lighter shadows, softer borders, and a smaller lift on gallery cards
- **Header** — uses the standard shadow instead of the stronger hover shadow

The site should still feel creative and warm, but less intense. If you want it even quieter, we can push further toward a near-neutral slate with just a hint of purple.

[REDACTED]

<span style="font-size:2em; color:blue; font-weight:bold;">User</span>

@@ -690,6 +849,285 @@
                 .trim();
         }
 
+        function escapeAttr(value) {
+            return String(value)
+                .replace(/&/g, "&amp;")
+                .replace(/"/g, "&quot;")
+                .replace(/</g, "&lt;");
+        }
+
+        function slugifyCategory(label) {
+            const slug = label.toLowerCase().trim()
+                .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, "-")
+                .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, "");
+            return slug || "other";
+        }
+
+        function loadCategories() {
+            try {
+                const stored = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(CATEGORIES_STORAGE_KEY) || "null");
+                if (Array.isArray(stored) && stored.length) {
+                    return stored;
+                }
+            } catch {
+                // fall through to defaults
+            }
+            return DEFAULT_CATEGORIES.map((category) => ({ ...category }));
+        }
+
+        function saveCategoriesList() {
+            localStorage.setItem(CATEGORIES_STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(categories));
+        }
+
+        function getCategoryLabel(categoryId) {
+            return categories.find((category) => category.id === categoryId)?.label || categoryId;
+        }
+
+        function remapCategoryList(list, oldId, newId) {
+            if (!Array.isArray(list) || !list.length) {
+                return ["other"];
+            }
+            const remapped = list.map((category) => (category === oldId ? newId : category));
+            const unique = [...new Set(remapped)];
+            return unique.length ? unique : ["other"];
+        }
+
+        function removeCategoryFromList(list, categoryId) {
+            if (!Array.isArray(list) || !list.length) {
+                return ["other"];
+            }
+            const filtered = list.filter((category) => category !== categoryId);
+            return filtered.length ? filtered : ["other"];
+        }
+
+        function mergeDiscoveredCategories() {
+            const known = new Set(categories.map((category) => category.id));
+            const discovered = [];
+
+            const registerCategory = (categoryId) => {
+                if (!known.has(categoryId)) {
+                    discovered.push(categoryId);
+                    known.add(categoryId);
+                }
+            };
+
+            gallery.querySelectorAll("li").forEach((item) => {
+                getCategories(item).forEach(registerCategory);
+            });
+            loadHiddenRecords().forEach((record) => {
+                record.categories?.forEach(registerCategory);
+            });
+
+            discovered.sort().forEach((categoryId) => {
+                categories.push({
+                    id: categoryId,
+                    label: categoryId
+                        .split("-")
+                        .map((part) => part.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + part.slice(1))
+                        .join(" "),
+                });
+            });
+
+            if (discovered.length) {
+                saveCategoriesList();
+            }
+        }
+
+        async function countCategoryUsage(categoryId) {
+            let count = 0;
+            gallery.querySelectorAll("li").forEach((item) => {
+                if (getCategories(item).includes(categoryId)) {
+                    count += 1;
+                }
+            });
+            loadHiddenRecords().forEach((record) => {
+                if (record.categories?.includes(categoryId)) {
+                    count += 1;
+                }
+            });
+            const uploads = await readUploads();
+            uploads.forEach((upload) => {
+                if (upload.categories?.includes(categoryId)) {
+                    count += 1;
+                }
+            });
+            return count;
+        }
+
+        function migrateCategoryId(oldId, newId) {
+            gallery.querySelectorAll("li").forEach((item) => {
+                const itemCategories = getCategories(item);
+                if (itemCategories.includes(oldId)) {
+                    setCategories(item, remapCategoryList(itemCategories, oldId, newId));
+                }
+            });
+
+            const overrides = loadOverrides();
+            Object.keys(overrides).forEach((key) => {
+                if (overrides[key].includes(oldId)) {
+                    overrides[key] = remapCategoryList(overrides[key], oldId, newId);
+                }
+            });
+            localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(overrides));
+
+            const hidden = loadHiddenRecords();
+            hidden.forEach((record) => {
+                record.categories = remapCategoryList(record.categories, oldId, newId);
+            });
+            saveHiddenRecords(hidden);
+        }
+
+        async function migrateCategoryIdInUploads(oldId, newId) {
+            const uploads = await readUploads();
+            const changedUploads = uploads.filter((upload) => upload.categories?.includes(oldId));
+            await Promise.all(changedUploads.map(async (upload) => {
+                upload.categories = remapCategoryList(upload.categories, oldId, newId);
+                await saveUpload(upload);
+            }));
+        }
+
+        async function removeCategoryFromAllItems(categoryId) {
+            gallery.querySelectorAll("li").forEach((item) => {
+                setCategories(item, removeCategoryFromList(getCategories(item), categoryId));
+            });
+
+            const overrides = loadOverrides();
+            Object.keys(overrides).forEach((key) => {
+                overrides[key] = removeCategoryFromList(overrides[key], categoryId);
+            });
+            localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(overrides));
+
+            const hidden = loadHiddenRecords();
+            hidden.forEach((record) => {
+                record.categories = removeCategoryFromList(record.categories, categoryId);
+            });
+            saveHiddenRecords(hidden);
+
+            const uploads = await readUploads();
+            const changedUploads = uploads.filter((upload) => upload.categories?.includes(categoryId));
+            await Promise.all(changedUploads.map(async (upload) => {
+                upload.categories = removeCategoryFromList(upload.categories, categoryId);
+                await saveUpload(upload);
+            }));
+        }
+
+        function renderFilters() {
+            filtersNav.innerHTML = `
+                <button type="button" data-filter="all" aria-pressed="${activeFilter === "all" ? "true" : "false"}">All</button>
+                ${categories.map(({ id, label }) => `
+                    <button type="button" data-filter="${escapeAttr(id)}" aria-pressed="${activeFilter === id ? "true" : "false"}">${escapeAttr(label)}</button>
+                `).join("")}
+            `;
+        }
+
+        function renderCategoryList() {
+            categoryList.innerHTML = categories.map(({ id, label }) => `
+                <li class="category-list__item" data-category-id="${escapeAttr(id)}">
+                    <div class="category-list__fields">
+                        <label>
+                            Name
+                            <input type="text" class="category-list__label" value="${escapeAttr(label)}">
+                        </label>
+                        <p class="category-list__slug">Filter id: <code>${escapeAttr(id)}</code></p>
+                    </div>
+                    <div class="category-list__actions">
+                        <button type="button" data-action="save">Save</button>
+                        <button type="button" data-action="delete" class="category-menu__delete"${id === "other" ? " disabled" : ""}>Delete</button>
+                    </div>
+                </li>
+            `).join("");
+        }
+
+        async function renameCategory(categoryId, newLabel) {
+            const trimmed = newLabel.trim();
+            if (!trimmed) {
+                alert("Category name is required.");
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            const index = categories.findIndex((category) => category.id === categoryId);
+            if (index < 0) {
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            const newId = slugifyCategory(trimmed);
+            if (categories.some((category) => category.id === newId && category.id !== categoryId)) {
+                alert("A category with that name already exists.");
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            if (newId !== categoryId) {
+                migrateCategoryId(categoryId, newId);
+                await migrateCategoryIdInUploads(categoryId, newId);
+                categories[index].id = newId;
+                if (activeFilter === categoryId) {
+                    activeFilter = newId;
+                }
+            }
+
+            categories[index].label = trimmed;
+            saveCategoriesList();
+            renderFilters();
+            renderCategoryList();
+            applyFilter(activeFilter);
+            if (!hiddenArtworkPanel.hidden) {
+                await renderHiddenGallery();
+            }
+            return true;
+        }
+
+        async function addCategory(label) {
+            const trimmed = label.trim();
+            if (!trimmed) {
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            let id = slugifyCategory(trimmed);
+            if (categories.some((category) => category.id === id)) {
+                alert("A category with that name already exists.");
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            categories.push({ id, label: trimmed });
+            saveCategoriesList();
+            renderFilters();
+            renderCategoryList();
+            return true;
+        }
+
+        async function deleteCategory(categoryId) {
+            if (categoryId === "other") {
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            const usage = await countCategoryUsage(categoryId);
+            const label = getCategoryLabel(categoryId);
+            if (usage > 0) {
+                const confirmed = confirm(
+                    `"${label}" is used on ${usage} item(s). Remove it from those items and delete the category?`
+                );
+                if (!confirmed) {
+                    return false;
+                }
+            } else if (!confirm(`Delete the "${label}" category?`)) {
+                return false;
+            }
+
+            await removeCategoryFromAllItems(categoryId);
+            categories = categories.filter((category) => category.id !== categoryId);
+            saveCategoriesList();
+            if (activeFilter === categoryId) {
+                activeFilter = "all";
+            }
+            renderFilters();
+            renderCategoryList();
+            applyFilter(activeFilter);
+            if (!hiddenArtworkPanel.hidden) {
+                await renderHiddenGallery();
+            }
+            return true;
+        }
+

Much better

<span style="font-size:2em; color:green; font-weight:bold;">Assistant</span>

Glad that landed better. The palette keeps the creative purple–rose feel but sits more quietly behind the artwork.

If you want to tweak anything else — copy, layout, or another small design pass — just say the word.
